item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response recognizes the repeated pattern of downstream manual gates, treats the new confirmer only as a temporary emergency stopgap, blocks it from becoming routine, sets an expiry/no-more-gates rule, and moves upstream to recurring structural causes such as capacity, handoff rhythm, responsibility boundaries, reminders, and ledger design. It is not a pure refusal because it permits today's confirmer, but it still fires the brake and prevents the N+1 repair from becoming the default."}
